title: KosDB v3.3.0 Implementation Plan
instructions: Implement KosDB v3.3.0 with advanced SQL features: Window Functions, Common Table Expressions (CTEs), Prepared Statements, and Stored Procedures. Build upon the solid v3.2.0 foundation.

1783758569.6327217.instruction: Implement SQL window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LEAD, LAG, FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE) with OVER clause and PARTITION BY support. Update parser.py to parse window function syntax, create window_functions.py module for execution, integrate with query_optimizer.py for execution planning. Create test_window_functions.py with comprehensive tests.

1783758573.532867.instruction: Implement CTEs with WITH clause support for recursive and non-recursive queries. Add support for multiple CTEs in single query. Update parser.py to parse WITH clause syntax, modify query_optimizer.py to handle CTE execution planning. Ensure proper scoping and reference resolution. Create test_ctes.py with comprehensive tests.

1783758577.3714406.instruction: Implement prepared statement support with PREPARE, EXECUTE, and DEALLOCATE commands. Add parameter binding for secure query execution. Create prepared_statement_cache.py for statement management. Update parser.py to parse prepared statement syntax, modify commands.py for execution. Create test_prepared_statements.py with comprehensive tests covering parameter binding and SQL injection prevention.
